name: Swiss Style Oats
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil.
2. Stir in fruit, salt, and honey. Return to boil.
3. Add oats; stir.
4. Lower heat to simmer. Cover and cook for 15 minutes (stir before serving).
5. Sprinkle each serving with 1-1/2 teaspoons wheat germ and 1 tablespoon almonds.
6. Serve with milk.
